chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-596 of 2026 [Insaf Ali Lashari v. Tufail Ahmed Abro & others] DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Present: Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. Riazat Ali Sahar J. 1. For orders on M.A. No.2417/2026. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.2418/2026. 4. For orders on M.A. No.2419/2026. 5. For hearing of main case. 14.04.2026 Mr. Sahir Ayaz Palijo, Advocate along-with petitioner. == Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry, J- Urgency granted. Exemption application is granted subject to all just exceptions. The petitioner has challenged appointments of the Chief Executive Officer and other Officers of the Hyderabad Water & Sewerage Corporation. The premise of the challenge is that said appointments were made by the Board of the Corporation instead of the Sindh Public Service Commission. In our view, the petition is misconceived inasmuch as section 11 of the Hyderabad Water and Sewerage Corporation Act, 2023 empowers the Board of the Corporation to appoint the Chief Executive Officer. Similarly, section 14 empowers the Board to appoint other Officers of the Corporation on such terms and conditions as may be prescribed or as may be determined by the Board of the Corporation. Therefore, the petition is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
